title: Foreign key constraint fails to prevent consistency error.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE comments (id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, content VARCHAR(255), CONSTRAINT fk_user FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO comments (id, user_id, content) VALUES (1, 2, 'This is a comment');
SELECT * FROM comments WHERE user_id IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Foreign key constraint fails to enforce data consistency
